title: elatostema brevicaudatum
intro: Elatostema brevicaudatum, also known as the Borneo Elatostema or Elatostema, is a type of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elatostema brevicaudatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne. Elatostema brevicaudatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
